loan_contract_no.text: เลขที่สัญญา

root.sql:
SELECT (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop ) as coop_name, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, sc_lon_m_loan_card.year_total_interest, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'DAYที่ SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract_thai, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_description, PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_address_line(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,('0')::text) as address_pres, sc_lon_m_contract.remark, pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'YYYY') as year_date,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount, pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as thai_loan_approve_amount , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,1,1) as c_id_card_1, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,2,1) as c_id_card_2, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,3,1) as c_id_card_3, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,4,1) as c_id_card_4, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,5,1) as c_id_card_5, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,6,1) as c_id_card_6, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,7,1) as c_id_card_7, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,8,1) as c_id_card_8, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,9,1) as c_id_card_9, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,10,1) as c_id_card_10, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,11,1) as c_id_card_11, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,12,1) as c_id_card_12, substr(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.id_card,13,1) as c_id_card_13,
sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type
--โฉนดกับที่อยู่ ,(select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '04' ) as coll_ref_own_no
,(select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.remark from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '04' ) as coll_remark
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj, sc_lon_m_loan_card
where ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_objective_code = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_objective_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_obj.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and (sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type in('พค','พบ'))
/*WHERE*/
--and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = 'พค00000267'
